head: dense_fg_aux_ms
hypothesis: E-53a: Multi-scale dense supervision 8ep probe. Add stride-4 (56×56) DenseForegroundHead alongside existing stride-8 (28×28) head. Conservative weights: s8=0.5, s4=0.25. Targets generated independently at each resolution. Core question: does 56×56 auxiliary supervision improve tiny-object IoU and pygmy_seahorse_0 without degrading overall pf_mIoU? Gated: must pass 7 go/no-go criteria at 8ep before E-53b 30ep.
